title: Tunisian Silky Egg Scramble
description: A flavorful and silky egg scramble with tunisian spices, perfect for a quick breakfast. Serve hot with your favorite sides.
instructions: Heat the Tunisian silky oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the chopped fresh herbs and cook for an additional minute.
In a large bowl, whisk together the eggs and spices.
Pour the egg mixture over the garlic and herbs in the skillet.
Scramble the eggs until they are cooked through, breaking them up into small curds.
Serve the egg scramble hot, garnished with additional fresh herbs if desired.
